message:
test(tools,server): add 19 tests for LLM JSON extraction + hex_encode

LLM module (15 tests): extract_fenced_json edge cases (CRLF, no closing
fence, invalid content, empty, first-block selection), extract_brace_json
edge cases (nested, no braces, reversed, single brace, invalid),
stubbed_completion_content response validation.

Static export (4 tests): hex_encode empty, single byte, multi-byte,
lowercase padding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
